sentences.target: J'ai fini cet ouvrage hier soir.

translations.fr: J'ai fini cet ouvrage hier soir.
translations.en: I finished this book last night.
translations.de: Ich habe dieses Buch gestern Abend zu Ende gelesen.
translations.it: Ieri sera ho finito questo libro.
translations.ru: Я закончил эту книгу вчера вечером.
translations.pt: Ontem à noite terminei este livro.
translations.he: סיימתי את הספר הזה אתמול בלילה.
translations.vi: Tối qua tôi đọc xong cuốn sách này.
translations.nl: Gisteravond heb ik dit boek uitgelezen.
translations.uk: Я закінчив цю книгу вчора ввечері.
translations.hu: Tegnap este befejeztem ezt a könyvet.
translations.hi: मैंने यह किताब कल रात खत्म की।
translations.el: Τελείωσα αυτό το βιβλίο χτες το βράδυ.
translations.nb: I går kveld leste jeg ferdig denne boken.
translations.id: Saya selesai membaca buku ini tadi malam.
translations.sv: I går kväll läste jag klart den här boken.
translations.ro: Ieri seară am terminat această carte.
translations.cs: Včera večer jsem tu knihu dočetl.
translations.da: I går aftes læste jeg denne bog færdig.
translations.fi: Eilen illalla sain tämän kirjan luettua.
translations.ja: 昨夜この本を読み終えました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel; marks the 1st person singular subject.
Auxiliary 'avoir' in present 1st person singular; forms the passé composé with the past participle.
Past participle of the main verb; in a compound tense with 'avoir' to express completion; governs the direct object.
Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) used before vowel/mute h; modifies 'ouvrage'.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of 'fini'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate; part of the time expression.
Temporal noun forming the fixed time expression 'hier soir'; functions as a time complement.

sentences.target: Tu recommandes cet ouvrage aux débutants.

translations.fr: Tu recommandes cet ouvrage aux débutants.
translations.en: You recommend this book for beginners.
translations.de: Du empfiehlst dieses Buch für Anfänger.
translations.zh-Hans: 你向初学者推荐这本书。
translations.yue: 你向初學者推薦呢本書。
translations.ru: Ты рекомендуешь эту книгу для начинающих.
translations.pt: Você recomenda este livro para iniciantes.
translations.he: אתה ממליץ על הספר הזה למתחילים.
translations.vi: Bạn giới thiệu cuốn sách này cho người mới bắt đầu.
translations.nl: Je raadt dit boek aan voor beginners.
translations.uk: Ти рекомендуєш цю книгу для початківців.
translations.hu: Ezt a könyvet ajánlod a kezdőknek.
translations.hi: तुम शुरुआती लोगों के लिए इस किताब की सिफारिश करते हो।
translations.el: Προτείνεις αυτό το βιβλίο για αρχάριους.
translations.nb: Du anbefaler denne boken for nybegynnere.
translations.id: Kamu merekomendasikan buku ini untuk pemula.
translations.sv: Du rekommenderar den här boken för nybörjare.
translations.da: Du anbefaler denne bog til begyndere.
translations.ja: 初心者にはこの本を勧めます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, takes a direct object and an indirect recipient.
Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) modifying 'ouvrage'.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of 'recommandes'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'les'; introduces the indirect object (recipients).
Common noun (masc. pl.); object of the preposition 'aux'.

sentences.target: On vend un ouvrage d'occasion ici.

translations.fr: On vend un ouvrage d'occasion ici.
translations.en: We sell a used book here.
translations.es: Aquí vendemos libros de segunda mano.
translations.vi: Ở đây chúng tôi bán sách cũ.
translations.hi: यहाँ हम पुरानी किताबें बेचते हैं।
translations.id: Di sini kami menjual buku bekas.
translations.ro: Aici vindem cărți la mâna a doua.
translations.ja: ここでは中古の本を売っています。

tokens.explanation: Generic/indefinite subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article (masc. sg.) introducing the direct object.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of 'vend'.
Preposition 'de' with elision before a vowel; forms the qualifying phrase 'd'occasion'.
Noun complement to 'de'; in the fixed expression 'd'occasion' meaning 'second-hand'.
Adverb of place; indicates location of the sale.

sentences.target: Nous cherchons un ouvrage sur le jardinage.
sentences.reading: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ œ̃ uvʁaʒ syʁ lə ʒaʁdinaʒ/

translations.fr: Nous cherchons un ouvrage sur le jardinage.
translations.ipa: /nu ʃɛʁʃɔ̃ œ̃ uvʁaʒ syʁ lə ʒaʁdinaʒ/
translations.en: We are looking for a book on gardening.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un libro sobre jardinería.
translations.de: Wir suchen ein Buch über Gartenarbeit.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un libro sul giardinaggio.
translations.ko: 우리는 원예에 관한 책을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一本关于园艺的书。
translations.yue: 我哋想搵一本關於園藝嘅書。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um livro sobre jardinagem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một cuốn sách về làm vườn.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن كتاب عن البستنة.
translations.nl: We zoeken een boek over tuinieren.
translations.hi: हम बागवानी पर एक किताब ढूँढ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en bok om hagearbeid.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari sebuah buku tentang berkebun.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en bok om trädgårdsskötsel.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en bog om havearbejde.
translations.ja: 私たちは園芸の本を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive; can take a prepositional complement.
Indefinite article (masc. sg.) introducing the direct object.
Common noun (masc. sg.); direct object of 'cherchons'.
Preposition introducing a thematic complement ('sur le jardinage').
Definite article (masc. sg.) modifying 'jardinage'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur' (topic of the book sought).
